title: Router Agent Output (v1)
description: Documentation-level canonical schema for Router Agent output in the gile-agents v1 pipeline. Mirrors the Router → Document Planner contract in agents/HANDOFF_CONTRACTS.md.

task_type.description: High-level workflow/category label selected by the Router.

task_subtype.description: Optional, more granular categorization under task_type (e.g. disciplinary_order).

route_to.description: Target downstream pipeline or agent group.

confidence.description: Confidence score for the routing decision.

reasoning_summary.description: Short natural-language justification for the routing decision.

router_version.description: Identifier of the router configuration/model used.

handoff_payload.description: Payload forwarded to the Document Planner.

message_text.description: Raw or lightly-normalized user request text.

metadata.description: Non-text attributes such as channel, user role, department.

context.description: Contextual artifacts such as previous messages or case IDs.

attachments.description: List of attachment descriptors available to downstream agents.

locale_hint.description: Hint about source language or expected output locale.

routing_alternatives.description: Optional array of fallback or alternative routing hypotheses.
